app.name: MGo
app.tagline: Chat with your local models via LM Studio
app.heroSubtitle: welcome to the mgo chat interface

update.noGit: No Git folder — install via git clone
update.browserOnly: Updates only work in desktop app or npm run mgo
update.restartHint: Restart the app to apply all changes.

chat.modelNoVision: This model does not support images
chat.emptyTitle: How can I help you today?
chat.emptyHint: Pick a model and start chatting with your local LLM.

suggestions.explain: Explain quantum computing in simple terms
suggestions.code: Write a Python function to sort a list
suggestions.write: Write a formal email in Persian
suggestions.summarize: Summarize the key points of this topic

chat.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Check LM Studio connection.
chat.errorConnection: Cannot reach LM Studio. Open Developer tab and start the server.
chat.errorNoVision: The selected model does not support images.

palette.title: Color palette
palette.subtitle: Tap a style — changes apply instantly

settings.title: Settings
settings.systemPromptPlaceholder: Extra instructions (optional) — Persian RTL replies are default
settings.aboutText: MGo is a modern chat UI for LM Studio created by Milad Clark 2026. Version {{version}}.
settings.devProxyHint: Dev mode: requests go through /api/lmstudio proxy to LM Studio (fixes CORS).
